rows.label: tlk43320142_03_msg0002
rows.name:
You can't take your eye
off him for a second.

rows.label: tlk43320142_03_msg0003
rows.name:
If he grows up straight, someday
he should accept what happened
with his parents and Nis.

rows.label: tlk43320142_03_msg0004
rows.name:
To be honest, I'm not sure if he
really understands what his folks
are going through right now.
